The '''Library of Xer''' was a [[Library/Legends|library]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Criton's Point]].

==History==
The library was built in [[26,000 BBY/Legends|26,000 BBY]],<ref name="Pentastar" /> by [[Xer VIII]] or one of his predecessors.<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/30376852|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Daniel Wallace|Dan_Wallace]]|date=2009-08-24|time=8:07 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200802103104/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-100}}</ref>

The library was slowly being reopened by a research team during the period of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Inside one vault, they found a tiny tree that was being nourished by [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Its Force-presence attracted Force users—both [[Sith/Legends|dark]] and [[Jedi/Legends|light]].<ref name="Pentastar" />
